contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: edgar.html plug-and-play modules grid refresh (8 -> 18 entries)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/114
  
  Details:
  Refreshed the modules grid on truesight.me/edgar.html — it had not been touched
  since July 2025 and was missing the entire partner-ops surface plus the two
  new standalone platforms.
  
  Added 10 modules (now 18 total). Each demo URL verified live with curl before
  shipping:
  - Sales Reporter (dapp.truesight.me/report_sales.html)
  - Asset Receipt (dapp.truesight.me/report_asset_receipt.html)
  - Partner Check-in (dapp.truesight.me/partner_check_in.html) — shipped 2026-05-12
  - Outbound Warmup Review (dapp.truesight.me/warmup_review.html)
  - Stores Nearby (dapp.truesight.me/stores_nearby.html)
  - Restock Recommender (dapp.truesight.me/restock_recommender.html)
  - Shipping Planner (dapp.truesight.me/shipping_planner.html)
  - Proposals (dapp.truesight.me/view_open_proposals.html)
  - Credentialing CV Platform (truesight.me/credentials/)
  - Capoeira Practice Platform (capoeira.agroverse.shop/practice.html)
  
  Also added Practitioner Credentials link under footer's Data and Records.
  
  Updated the file-header comment on data/edgar-modules.js to reflect that the
  sync from Wix is dead (post-Wix migration) and the file is now hand-maintained,
  matched by an in-sync inline copy in edgar.html.
  
  Shipped via truesight_me_beta PR #114, merged, and synced to truesight_me_prod.
  Verified live page now shows 18 modules.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
